component.name: Breadcrumb
component.description: Show the user's location within a navigational hierarchy.

commonPatterns.name: basic-breadcrumb
commonPatterns.description: Standard breadcrumb trail with links and a current page

commonPatterns.name: with-ellipsis
commonPatterns.description: Collapsed middle segments for deep hierarchies

commonPatterns.name: with-router-link
commonPatterns.description: Using asChild to render a framework router Link

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Breadcrumb for step indicators in a wizard
antiPatterns.reason: Breadcrumbs indicate location in a hierarchy, not progress through a sequence
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a Stepper or Progress component for multi-step flows

antiPatterns.scenario: Making the current page a clickable link
antiPatterns.reason: The current page should be non-interactive to indicate the user is already there
antiPatterns.alternative: Use BreadcrumbPage for the final item, not BreadcrumbLink

antiPatterns.reason: The nav element needs an ordered list for proper semantics
antiPatterns.alternative: Always wrap BreadcrumbItems in a BreadcrumbList

slots.BreadcrumbList: Ordered list container for all items
slots.BreadcrumbLink: Clickable link to a parent page
slots.BreadcrumbPage: Non-interactive label for the current page
slots.BreadcrumbSeparator: Visual divider between segments (defaults to ChevronRight)

composition.asChild: BreadcrumbLink supports asChild to render as a router Link

interactions.hover: BreadcrumbLink transitions to foreground color on hover

responsive.mobile: Wraps naturally; gap adjusts from gap-1.5 to gap-2.5 at sm breakpoint

accessibility.screenReader: BreadcrumbPage is announced as current page via aria-current="page"; separators are aria-hidden

rules: Always wrap items in BreadcrumbList inside Breadcrumb
The last item should be BreadcrumbPage, not BreadcrumbLink
Use BreadcrumbEllipsis to collapse deep hierarchies (more than 4 levels)

aiHints.context: Use for hierarchical navigation showing the user's current location. The final segment should always be BreadcrumbPage. Use asChild on BreadcrumbLink to integrate with framework routers.
